sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the animation frames to see if anything changed. The animation_frame_count is 6, which is different from before (9). This might indicate something different happened.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
entry = last_animation[0]
print(f"Total frames: {len(entry.frames)}")
for j, frame in enumerate(entry.frames):
    seg = frame.segmentation
    yellow_objs = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']
    positions = []
    for n in yellow_objs:
        b = n['boundary']
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in b) / len(b)
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in b) / len(b)
        positions.append(f"({cr:.0f},{cc:.0f})p{n['pixels']}")
    print(f"  Frame {j}: {positions}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
6 frames but no movement at all. The shape is stuck. The game seems to be in a broken state after the game over.
Let me check the current bars to see if they're all reset.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current bar configuration
seg = current_frame.segmentation
bars = {}
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 3 and 33 <= n['boundary'][0][0] <= 50 and 35 <= n['boundary'][0][1] <= 60:
        b = n['boundary']
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in b) / len(b)
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in b) / len(b)
        bars[(cr, cc)] = n['color']
for k in sorted(bars.keys()):
    print(f"Bar at ({k[0]:.0f}, {k[1]:.0f}): {bars[k]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
All bars are reset to w. The shape is at (25, 46), which is the original position. But the shape doesn't move when I set bars and click the blue circle.
This is very strange. The game worked before the game over, but now it doesn't. Let me think about what might have changed.
Wait, maybe the issue is that the game "reset" after game over, but the reset didn't fully restore the game state. Perhaps the game is waiting for some other input.
Let me look at the left panel more carefully. The left panel has:
1. A dark shape at (18, 23) - target position
2. Bars at rows 33-48, cols 8-23
3. Two small panels at the bottom with shapes
Maybe I need to interact with the left panel somehow. Or maybe I need to click one of the small panels at the bottom to "select" the shape before moving it.
Let me try clicking the dark panel (which has the yellow shape that matches the bottom shape in the right panel) and then try to move the shape.
Actually, looking at the bottom panels:
- Left panel: blue background with yellow shape (top shape's position?)
- Right panel: dark background with yellow shape (bottom shape's position?)
Maybe I need to click the right panel (dark background) to select the bottom shape, and then set bars and click the blue circle.
Let me try this.

sections.content:

Plan: Try clicking the dark panel (right bottom panel) to select the bottom shape, then set bars and execute.
